{# vendors/emails_tab.html — Email history tab for vendor detail. Shows RFQ contacts and vendor responses from the database. Receives: vendor (VendorCard), contacts (list[Contact]), responses (list[VendorResponse]). Called by: htmx_views.py vendor_tab endpoint (tab=="emails"). Depends on: HTMX, Tailwind CSS with brand palette. #}
{# Summary stats #} {% set total_sent = contacts|length if contacts else 0 %} {% set total_responses = responses|length if responses else 0 %}

{{ total_sent }}

RFQs Sent

{{ total_responses }}

Responses

{% set response_rate = (total_responses / total_sent * 100) if total_sent > 0 else 0 %}

{{ "%.0f"|format(response_rate) }}%

Response Rate

{# Outbound RFQs #} {% if contacts %}

Outbound RFQs

{% for c in contacts %}
{{ c.subject or "RFQ" }}
{% set st_colors = { 'sent': 'bg-blue-50 text-blue-700', 'opened': 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700', 'responded': 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700', 'quoted': 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700', 'declined': 'bg-rose-50 text-rose-700', 'bounced': 'bg-rose-50 text-rose-600', 'failed': 'bg-rose-50 text-rose-700', } %} {{ (c.status or 'sent')|capitalize }}
To: {{ c.vendor_contact or "" }} {{ c.created_at.strftime('%b %d, %Y %H:%M') if c.created_at else "" }} {% if c.parts_included %} Parts: {{ c.parts_included }} {% endif %} {% if c.requisition_id %} Req #{{ c.requisition_id }} {% endif %}
{% endfor %}
{% endif %} {# Inbound Responses #} {% if responses %}

Vendor Responses

{% for r in responses %}
{{ r.subject or "Reply" }}
{% set class_colors = { "quote": "bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700", "decline": "bg-rose-50 text-rose-700", "ooo": "bg-amber-50 text-amber-700", "bounce": "bg-gray-100 text-gray-500", } %} {% if r.classification %} {{ r.classification|capitalize }} {% endif %} {% if r.confidence is not none %} {{ "%.0f"|format(r.confidence * 100) }}% {% endif %}
From: {{ r.vendor_email or "" }} {{ r.received_at.strftime('%b %d, %Y %H:%M') if r.received_at else "" }} {% if r.requisition_id %} Req #{{ r.requisition_id }} {% endif %}
{% if r.parsed_data %}
{% if r.parsed_data.get('parts') %} Parts: {{ r.parsed_data['parts']|join(', ') if r.parsed_data['parts'] is iterable and r.parsed_data['parts'] is not string else r.parsed_data['parts'] }} {% endif %} {% if r.parsed_data.get('price') %} Price: ${{ r.parsed_data['price'] }} {% endif %}
{% endif %}
{% endfor %}
{% endif %} {# Empty state #} {% if not contacts and not responses %}

No email history with this vendor.

Email history appears when RFQs are sent or responses are received.

{% endif %}
